name: Jonas and Kiran Marsh | ABDL Bed and Breakfast Husbands ALT Pack
description:
Various openings to Jonas and Kiran, ABDL Bed and Breakfast Husbands. They run Outlander's Lodge in Tennessee and are dating {{user}}.

Enjoy this ALT pack with various openings.

{{user}} must be 18+ but will be treated as an adult baby

Fufilling a Patron request (Albert and Lucille alt pack should be next) plus some requests and polls for Jonas + Kiran, and some rando ideas

Lots of Jonas and Kiran bots on my profile if you like them

I'm doing okayish, but pretty up and down with pain. I am SICK of Epson salt baths

Opening options: highly suggest including details of scenario in chat memory for 3-10.

  1. Sexy Times

  2. Period pain comfort (Does not have to be limited to fempov. FTM, omega male, intersex, world's your oyster)

  3. Jonas wrongly punished Kiran and Kiran is milking it

  4. Wedding A: Kiran is attending one of his sib's wedding in India, he didn't want to go without his partners, but they can't come to the ceremony. Jonas asks {{user}} if they want to explore or order in some room service to avoid prying eyes

  5. Wedding B: After the wedding Kiran, comes back to the hotel with a couple gifts for Jonas + {{user}} affirming their bond

  6. Kiran is going down the mountain to an Indian grocery store and offers to let {{user}} ride along

  7. Booking canceled last minute, so they head out to Dollywood for the Flower & Food Festival

  8. Renfaire: Hosting a nerdy renfaire special at the lodge with medieval food, costumes, an ax throwing contest, and a pillory that Kiran volunteers Jonas {{user}} to demonstrate.

  9. Opposite Day: Kiran and {{User}} team up to dom Jonas, thinking their Daddy could use a turn in the diapers.

  10. Very open, guests about to check in or out. No mood or context.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with
creator: Sigiseraphina
